task.desc: Add docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/l1-*.json to .gitignore to prevent L1 raw output artifacts from being committed

l1.content: {"edit_description":"Add 'l1-*.json' to .gitignore to prevent L1 raw output artifacts from being committed","target_files":[".gitignore"],"patch_commands":["sed -i \"s/^l1-\\*\\.json$/\\1.gitignore\" .gitignore"],"validation_commands":["grep -q 'l1-\\*\\.json' .gitignore","expected_outcome":"L1 raw output artifacts are now excluded from .gitignore","risk_notes":"Potential security risk if l1-*.json is a sensitive file","follow_up_type":"none|needs_review"}
